PARTIAL TRANSLATION OF DOCUMENT 2341-PS
1939 REICHSGESETZBLATT, NO. 38, 2 MARCH 1939, PAGE 371
Decree on the education and careers of German officials of 28 February 1939
Par. 2.
The applicants must belong or have belonged to the party or one of its formations. In the selection the personal aptitude and character are decisive. Honorably discharged workers and soldiers (cf. par. 16 (1) and par. 17 of the decree on the care for soldiers and workers in the form of 29 Dec 1937-RGBl I, p. 1417) and children of child-rich families have preference. For pension applicants the special decrees apply.
Source:
Nazi Conspiracy and Aggression Volume IV
Office of the United States Chief Counsel for Prosecution of Axis Criminality
Washington, DC : United States Government Printing Office, 1946
